raw_consumer_statement:
asked them why they extended resolution date for Dispute XXXX, when i have XXXX  tracking showing the merchandise was MISSING from the packages and email from Merchant acknowledging refund is owed to me... American Express just said they need to keep contacting the merchant, so it is like they do not believe me because I am XXXX and merchant is XXXX  american owned. 

the merchant told them the items were delivered, but the merchant then told me via email i am owed refund because they were lost ( the items werent in packages ). I showed this email to American Express. XXXX trackings also says merchandise missing. I also showed this to american express. there is only one obvious conclusion here, I am owed my money back..
